parameters.jsCode:
// ── EDIT YOUR RESUME HERE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
// This is the only place the resume text lives. Update it here when your
// resume changes — no other node needs to be touched.
const resumeText = "Gadget
Walla Walla, WA | 505.926.1010 | your.email@example.com | linkedin.com/in/gadget | gadget.com

Senior Network & Security Engineer
Enterprise Network Architecture | Security Operations | Multi-Site Infrastructure | PCI-DSS Compliance

Senior network and security engineer with 20+ years of experience designing, implementing, and securing enterprise infrastructure across large distributed footprints. Proven track record managing networks spanning hundreds of locations, hardening security posture to compliance standards, and delivering high-availability connectivity for business-critical operations. Known for process reengineering that compresses timelines and for documentation quality that outlasts the engineer who wrote it. Equally comfortable as an individual contributor and as a technical lead shaping strategy and mentoring teams.

CORE COMPETENCIES
Network Architecture & Design | Security Operations & Hardening | PCI-DSS Compliance
Cisco Meraki (Enterprise & Branch) | Firewall Lifecycle Management | SD-WAN Design & Deployment
OSPF / BGP / MPLS / DMVPN | SIEM Monitoring (Splunk) | VPN Infrastructure
Multi-Site Network Management | Vulnerability Assessment & Remediation | Unified Communications (Avaya / Cisco UCM)
Cloud Hybrid Connectivity (Azure) | Network Segmentation & Defense-in-Depth | Documentation & IPAM

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Data Centers Network Engineer | Expeditors International — Remote | 2025–Present
Design and implement enterprise-grade network infrastructure for a global logistics company operating across 350 locations with 19,000+ employees. Serve as a key technical contributor to a team responsible for the reliability, performance, and security of a network that underpins worldwide operations.
• Architect and maintain Cisco routing and switching infrastructure including Cisco Nexus platforms, configuring VLANs, OSPF, BGP, QoS policies, and ACLs to ensure optimal traffic flow and segmentation across distributed sites
• Manage Cisco WLC and Juniper MIST wireless infrastructure, ensuring consistent, high-performance connectivity across all locations
• Administer and optimize HP/Aruba switching infrastructure, including VLAN design, spanning tree, and access control
• Lead enterprise-wide Fortinet SD-WAN deployment — designing traffic routing policies to optimize application performance and reduce WAN costs across the distributed footprint
• Manage hybrid cloud connectivity including Azure Express Routes, ensuring secure and performant access to cloud-hosted workloads
• Conduct network capacity planning to ensure infrastructure scales to meet business growth and operational demands
• Develop and maintain comprehensive network documentation including topology diagrams, runbooks, and configuration standards
Key technologies: Cisco (Nexus, WLC, IOS), Juniper MIST, HP/Aruba, Fortinet (SD-WAN), Azure Express Routes, OSPF, BGP, MPLS, VLANs, QoS

System Administrator | Umatilla Electric Cooperative — Hermiston, OR | 2020–2024
Owned IT network and systems infrastructure for a regional utility, with full accountability for security posture, compliance, monitoring, and operational reliability. Functioned as the primary network and security subject matter expert for the organization.
• Reduced enterprise firewall ruleset from 1,600 to 400 rules by auditing, deduplicating, and restructuring policy to enforce least-privilege access and defense-in-depth principles — directly improving security posture and simplifying ongoing lifecycle management
• Ensured PCI-DSS network compliance for cardholder data environments, implementing and documenting network segmentation to isolate payment systems, validate controls, and support audit evidence collection
• Monitored network and security events using Splunk and SolarWinds Orion, identifying anomalies and responding to incidents including initial triage, containment, and root cause analysis
• Administered and optimized firewall infrastructure (Palo Alto, Checkpoint) including rule creation, modification, and ongoing auditing
• Managed VPN infrastructure for remote access and site-to-site connectivity, ensuring secure communications for remote employees and third-party vendors
• Deployed and managed Docker-based application infrastructure on VMware and Proxmox virtualization platforms, improving application availability and maintainability
• Conducted vulnerability assessments and coordinated remediation with infrastructure and vendor teams to reduce attack surface
• Coached and mentored junior IT staff, improving team throughput and technical capability
Key technologies: Palo Alto, Checkpoint, SolarWinds Orion, Splunk, VMware, Proxmox, Docker, Tipping Point IPS, VPN, VLANs, PCI-DSS

Network Engineer (Lead — 1 of 2) | University of New Mexico Health Sciences Center — Albuquerque, NM | 2016–2019
Co-led network engineering for the largest employer in New Mexico: 7,000+ employees, 30,000+ weekly customers across hospital, clinic, and academic facilities, 1,000+ networked devices.
• Designed and implemented enterprise network infrastructure including Ethernet, VLANs, OSPF routing, QoS, and converged Voice & Data networks across hospital and academic campuses
• Managed multi-site Cisco and Juniper network infrastructure, implementing BGP and DNS configurations for efficient routing and cybersecurity
• Spearheaded a cybersecurity hardening initiative to bring IT equipment into compliance with evolving healthcare security standards, significantly strengthening protection of sensitive patient data
• Led a 2-day migration of a 12-rack, 100-server data center with minimal operational downtime, accomplished through comprehensive pre-work, resource allocation, and rehearsed execution
• Designed and maintained comprehensive network documentation including topology diagrams, IP addressing, and configuration standards — enabling operational continuity and institutional knowledge transfer
• Provided technical leadership to a team of technicians and analysts, distributing tasks and building problem-solving capability across the team
Key technologies: Cisco, Juniper, OSPF, BGP, VLANs, QoS, Voice/Data convergence, IPS, DNS

Computer Infrastructure Specialist (Contract — Sandia National Laboratories) | SAIC — Albuquerque, NM | 2014–2015
Contracted to support Non-Proliferation initiatives at Sandia National Laboratories (DOE/DoD). Applied rigorous hardening and documentation standards to classified and sensitive infrastructure.
• Implemented hardening processes for IT devices and systems in support of national security operations
• Produced comprehensive infrastructure documentation — network configurations, hardware specifications, and topology detail — at a standard required for large-format review and long-term operational integrity
• Left infrastructure measurably better documented and more securely maintained than upon contract start

Security Engineer | Cricket Communications — Albuquerque, NM | 2012–2013
Led a nationwide project to remediate network vulnerabilities and develop standardized security policies across the organization's infrastructure.
• Reprogrammed 1,200+ Cisco routers in 1.5 weeks against a 6-month original schedule by reengineering the deployment process — demonstrating process discipline and technical execution under pressure
• Engineered and implemented security measures and standardized protocols across network systems, improving resilience and consistency at national scale

Network Specialist II | New Mexico Department of Information Technology — Santa Fe, NM | 2006–2012
24/7/365 infrastructure specialist supporting statewide government networks across New Mexico, including high-profile assignments at the Governor's Mansion and executive facilities.
• Administered Avaya VoIP infrastructure for 6 years — call routing, dial plans, voicemail, SIP trunking, and coordination with telecom carriers for circuit provisioning and troubleshooting
• Scored 97% on the CCNA examination, reflecting deep foundational knowledge of routing, switching, and network design
• Managed government-grade network infrastructure with reliability and security requirements typical of public-sector operations
Key technologies: Avaya VoIP, Cisco networking, government network operations

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Applied Science, Information Security Systems | ITT Technical Institute
Bachelor of Applied Science, Electronics/Communications Engineering Technology | ITT Technical Institute
Associate of Applied Science, Computer/Electronics Engineering Technology | ITT Technical Institute
Certifications: CCNA (2011, 97%) | BICSI Cable Installation

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Routing & Switching: OSPF, BGP, MPLS, DMVPN, VRRP, STP, VLANs, QoS, ACLs, Cisco IOS, Cisco Nexus, HP/Aruba, Juniper

Wireless: Cisco Meraki (MX/MS/MR — enterprise deployment + 3-year homelab), Cisco WLC, Juniper MIST

Firewalls & Security: Palo Alto, Cisco ASA, Checkpoint, Juniper, Fortinet — rule management, hardening, lifecycle operations; Tipping Point IPS; iptables

SD-WAN: Fortinet (active enterprise deployment at Expeditors, 350 locations)

Cloud & Hybrid Connectivity: Azure (tunneling, Express Route management), basic AWS/GCP familiarity

VPN: Site-to-site, remote access, DMVPN, WireGuard

Voice & UC: Avaya VoIP (6 years production — routing, dial plans, SIP trunking, voicemail), Cisco UCM

Compliance: PCI-DSS (cardholder network segmentation, control implementation, audit support)

Monitoring & SIEM: Splunk (analyst/end-user), SolarWinds Orion, Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Netdata

Load Balancers: F5 LTM/GTM (conceptual; cross-functional team collaboration)

Systems & Virtualization: Linux (RedHat, CentOS), Windows Server, VMware, Proxmox, Docker, Kubernetes

Automation & Tooling: Ansible (in training), Python (in training), n8n, Bash, Traefik, CrowdSec

Documentation: Network topology diagrams, IPAM, runbooks, configuration standards, large-format infrastructure documentation";

return [{ json: { ...$json, resumeText } }];
